title: Nagano Prefectural Museum of History
summary: Nagano Prefectural Museum of History (長野県立歴史館, Nagano Kenritsu Rekishi-kan) opened in Chikuma, Nagano Prefecture, Japan, in 1994. Its focus is the archaeology (buried cultural properties) and documentary history of Nagano Prefecture.
